summary: Comprehensive testing of PDF storybook generation system completed. All requested features verified working: Story generation, Printable book creation, PDF download with proper structure (cover, story pages, moral, ending), and Content Vault displaying Kids Story Themes and Moral Templates correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation system fully tested and working. The new HTML + Playwright PDF generation creates professional storybooks with cover page, story pages (with narration and dialogue), moral page in colored box, and ending page with CTA. Templates are in /app/backend/templates/pdf/. PDF generator is in /app/backend/pdf_generator.py. Story data uses 'narration' field for content and dialogue uses 'line' field.

story_generation.details: Generates story with title, synopsis, scenes, characters, moral, and YouTube metadata

printable_book_creation.details: Creates printable book record with story data, returns bookId and downloadUrl

pdf_download.details: Downloads PDF with proper structure - cover, story pages, moral, ending. PDF size > 50KB, valid PDF header

details.cover_page: Genre badge, title, synopsis, age group badge, CreatorStudio AI branding
details.story_pages: Scene number, scene title, narration content, dialogue boxes with speaker names
details.moral_page: Green themed page with moral text in quote box
details.ending_page: The End title, CreatorStudio AI branding, CTA to visit website

details.viral_hooks: 12 hooks with niche badges and copy buttons
details.reel_structures: 5/8 structures with name, steps, and 'Best for:' field
details.kids_themes: 5/15 themes with theme name, age group badge, and moral text
details.moral_templates: 5/18 templates with theme badge, moral quote, and copy button

pdf_templates_verified.cover.html: Professional cover with gradient background, decorative SVGs, genre badge, title, synopsis, age badge
pdf_templates_verified.story-page.html: Story content pages with rotating color themes, scene headers, narration boxes, dialogue sections
pdf_templates_verified.moral.html: Green themed moral page with quote styling and decorative elements
pdf_templates_verified.ending.html: Purple themed ending page with 'The End' title, branding, and CTA

test_execution_summary.api_tests: All PDF generation flow tests passed
